---
title: "Your Project Title"
author: 
  - "Alex Delamer"
  - "Duc Hoang"
  - "Aatish Prasad"
  - "Kishori Akola"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-section: true
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Test

@ramos_e-commerce_nodate

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
## Data Loading
sales_data <- read_csv("data/sales_transaction_dataset.csv")

glimpse(sales_data)

```
```{r}
## Data Cleaning

sales_clean <- sales_data |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(
    date = mdy(date),
    revenue = price * quantity,
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date, label = TRUE),
    year_month = floor_date(date, "month")
  )

```

```{r}
transaction_summary <- sales_clean |>
  group_by(transaction_no, country) |>
  summarise(
    transaction_revenue = sum(revenue),
    total_quantity = sum(quantity),
    number_of_products = n_distinct(product_no),
    number_of_lines = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


transaction_percentage <- transaction_summary |>
  mutate(
    market = if_else(
      country == "United Kingdom",
      "United Kingdom",
      "Non-UK"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(market) |>
  summarise(
    number_of_transactions = n_distinct(transaction_no),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    percentage = number_of_transactions / sum(number_of_transactions) * 100
  )

transaction_percentage
```
